message:
chore(beads): file 3 metamorphic-coverage findings (5v5b4, afam7, irv8h)

testing-metamorphic PHASE-3 sweep. Existing tests/metamorphic_search.rs
already pins 8 search MRs (idempotence, limit-prefix, agent-filter union,
reindex idempotence, days-filter subset, case invariance, offset
pagination, agent-filter exclusivity); 3 user-listed candidates remain
uncovered:

- 5v5b4 [MEDIUM]: cass stats sum invariant (total == sum of per-source).
  Existing stats_by_source_grouping only checks non-empty array; sum
  invariant unverified. Multi-source seed setup needed (codex local +
  faked remote) to exercise non-trivial sum case.
- afam7 [LOW]: HTML export → re-export byte-idempotent for same source.
  Catches non-deterministic ordering regressions (HashMap iteration
  leaking into renderer). Needs transient-field whitelist (rendered_at).
- irv8h [MEDIUM]: agent-detection scan invariant under root permutation.
  scan(roots=[A,B]) HashSet-equal to scan(roots=[B,A]). Catches
  order-dependent connector dispatch on overlapping roots.

No tests landed this turn — single-source stats sum is trivially true
(MR Score < 2.0), and the other two require multi-root / multi-source
fixtures beyond the 30-min budget.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
